title: [kimi-review] 965566c: [SEVERITY: low] The matrix now contains two entries for boar
description:
Commit: 965566ce
Message: ci: build Nucleo puck target

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The matrix now contains two entries for board `nucleo_wl55jc` (apps `gateway` and `puck`). If any downstream step (artifact upload names, cache keys, build directory naming, concurrency groups) keys only on `matrix.board` and not `matrix.app`, the two jobs will collide/overwrite each other. Verify naming includes the app.
